codeReview.summary: The fix adequately addresses the original VAL-SETTINGS-004 failure. The e2e test now verifies that profile data appears in the UI after import by navigating to the home page and asserting 'Welcome, Import Data Restore User' is visible. Additionally, a backend bug in database.ts was fixed where importData() always associated imported data with default_user.id instead of the authenticated user's userId. The export.ts route now passes userId to importData().

summary: Fix for VAL-SETTINGS-004 is complete and adequate. The e2e test now adds a UI assertion after the success toast check, navigating to the home page and verifying 'Welcome, Import Data Restore User' appears to confirm data restoration. Additionally, a critical backend bug was discovered and fixed: importData() was always associating imported data with default_user.id instead of the authenticated user's userId. The fix modifies importData() to accept an optional userId parameter and updates export.ts to pass the authenticated user's userId when calling importData(). All 19 settings data tests passed after the fix.
